scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install --no-audit --no-fund --registry=https://registry.npmmirror.com --cache .\.npm-cache && npm --prefix frontend install --no-audit --no-fund --registry=https://registry.npmmirror.com --cache .\.npm-cache
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
